---
title: "Chapter 9 Practice"
author: Owen Webb
output: html_notebook
---

# Load data

```{r}
library(readr)

dplace_df <- read_csv("C:/Users/Owen/Documents/BSU Documents/DATAR 155/data/Values_Transport_dplace.csv")
```

Successfully loaded in the csv after 3 tries. When I tried the first time, I didn't type out the full pathway, only "data/Values_Transport_dplace.csv", which returned the following error:

Error: 'data/Values_Transport_dplace.csv' does not exist in current working directory ('C:/Users/Owen/Documents/BSU Documents/DATAR 155/DataR-155').


Writing out the full file pathway worked.
